title: Marketplace Manager - BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd!
